toast.reloadSkippedNoWallpaper: No wallpaper is configured, so there was nothing to reload
toast.refreshSkippedNoFolder: Wallpaper source directory is empty, so the wallpaper list could not be refreshed
toast.wallpaperColorsCached: Wallpaper colors cached for this display
toast.wallpaperColorsFailed: Failed to extract colors from the selected wallpaper
toast.wallpaperColorsNoSelection: Select a wallpaper first before applying wallpaper colors
toast.wallpaperColorsEngineUnavailable: linux-wallpaperengine must be available to generate wallpaper colors
main.error.notInstalled: linux-wallpaperengine was not found in PATH. Please check whether it is installed correctly.
main.error.assetsMissing: Wallpaper Engine assets were not found. Configure the assets directory in settings.
main.error.opengl: OpenGL initialization failed. Check driver and compositor compatibility.
main.error.autoRecovered: Auto recovered to the last available layout
panel.title: Wallpaper-Engine Wallpaper Selector
panel.folderInvalid: Wallpaper source directory is invalid or inaccessible.
panel.searchPlaceholder: Search wallpapers by name or ID
panel.propertiesLoadFailed: Failed to load wallpaper properties. This wallpaper format may not be supported yet, or this wallpaper may not run correctly
panel.noEditableProperties: This wallpaper has no editable extra properties yet
panel.propertiesNotice: Only directly editable properties supported by this plugin are shown here
panel.emptyAll: No wallpapers found in the source directory
panel.emptyFiltered: No wallpapers match the current filters
settings.resourcesIntro: Manage wallpaper source scanning and the cached images used for color extraction.
settings.defaults.title: Default application options
settings.defaults.description: These options are used as defaults when you apply a wallpaper without overriding its per-wallpaper settings.
settings.iconColor.label: Icon color
settings.iconColor.description: Color used for the bar widget icon
settings.enableExtraPropertiesEditor.des: Show wallpaper-specific extra properties in the panel sidebar when available
settings.showSidebarDescription.label: Show sidebar description
settings.showSidebarDescription.descript: Display wallpaper descriptions in the sidebar preview card
settings.badges.title: Wallpaper card badge order
settings.badges.description: Drag or use arrows to reorder badges, then toggle each one on or off.
settings.wallpapersFolder.label: Wallpaper source directory
settings.wallpaperScanCacheMinutes.label: Wallpaper scan cache duration
settings.wallpaperScanCacheMinutes.descr: Reuse the cached wallpaper list for this many minutes before scanning again when opening the panel
settings.defaultScaling.label: Scaling mode
settings.defaultScaling.description: Default scaling mode when no custom value is set
settings.defaultClamp.label: Clamp mode
settings.defaultClamp.description: Default edge handling mode used when rendering wallpapers
settings.defaultFps.label: FPS limit
settings.defaultFps.description: Default frame rate limit for wallpapers
settings.defaultNoFullscreenPause.label: Prevent fullscreen pause
settings.defaultNoFullscreenPause.descri: Prevent pausing while fullscreen apps are running
settings.defaultFullscreenPauseOnlyActiv: (Wayland only) Pause only when a fullscreen window is active
settings.defaultVolume.label: Volume
settings.defaultVolume.description: Volume used when wallpapers start without mute enabled
settings.defaultMuted.label: Start muted
settings.defaultMuted.description: Start wallpapers in mute mode by default
settings.defaultAudioReactiveEffects.des: Keep wallpaper audio processing enabled by default when the wallpaper supports it
settings.defaultNoAutomute.label: Do not mute when other apps play audio
settings.defaultNoAutomute.description: When enabled, wallpaper audio keeps playing even while other applications are outputting sound
settings.defaultDisableMouse.label: Disable mouse interaction
settings.defaultDisableMouse.description: Start wallpapers with mouse input disabled by default
settings.defaultDisableParallax.label: Disable parallax effect
settings.defaultDisableParallax.descript: Start wallpapers with parallax effects disabled by default
settings.autoApplyOnStartup.label: Auto apply on startup
settings.autoApplyOnStartup.description: If at least one screen has a configured wallpaper, run the engine automatically on startup
